SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JACQUELINE COWAN, IND. & DBA COTTAGE TABLE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUBINSTEIN, LINDA SHEAR, ELLIOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTHONY COWAN, IND., & DBA COTTAGE TABLE COMPANY JACQUELINE COWAN, IND. & DBA COTTAGE TABLE COMPANY $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,605.00, PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
